name: Chinese Mapo Tofu
recipeIngredient: 1 package Fresh tofu (any firmness), cut into cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wok or deep skillet, heat oil over high heat.
2. Add Black Bean Sauce and stir until fragrant.
3. Add Red Chili Paste with Garlic and ground pork. Stir fry for about 5 minutes until the meat is browned and cooked through.
4. Reduce heat to medium. Add cubed tofu and continue to cook for 5-8 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the tofu is heated through and well blended with the sauce.
5. Gently fold in chopped green onions and season with salt to taste.
6. Serve hot with cooked white rice.
Presentation: This dish pairs beautifully with steamed white rice or noodles.
Yield: Serves 4
